System: FreeBSD neo.vx.sk 8.1-PRERELEASE FreeBSD 8.1-PRERELEASE #3 r208765M: Thu Jun  3 09:59:09
 - Add basic docs to portdocs
 - Add optional mod_h264_streaming
 
 mod_h264_streaming is licensed under the 
 Creative Commons Attribution-Noncommercial-Share Alike 3.0 Unported license.
 
 The license permits non-commercial use, adaptation and redistribution.
 Therefore a license notice is displayed if compiling with mod_h264_streaming
 and MANUAL_PACKAGE_BUILD is set to prevent automatic creation of packages.
 
 Port maintainer (mnag@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
